title: Alex's Caves - Alphabet
body:
A Simple Resource pack for alphabet in your spelunkery table
which makes it easier to decipher the code
**Alex's Caves** is a big mod that adds cave biomes.

![alphabet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c8a2a4fe8f2aab54debfebdfcb1a4746f0c19a8.png)
